Related Entities

  • hospital ST LUKES HOSPITAL BETHLEHEM 5-star overall rating
  • hospital ST LUKE'S HOSPITAL - EASTON CAMPUS 3-star overall rating
  • hospital ST LUKE'S HOSPITAL - ANDERSON CAMPUS 5-star overall rating
  • snf NEW EASTWOOD HEALTHCARE AND REHABILITATION CENTER 5-star, 97 beds
  • snf Holy Family Manor 5-star, 208 beds
  • snf NORTHAMPTON COUNTY-GRACEDALE 1-star, 688 beds

  • snf Easton Skilled Nursing and Rehabilitation Center 3-star, 227 beds
  • snf GARDENS FOR MEMORY CARE AT EASTON, THE 5-star, 115 beds
  • snf GARDENS AT EASTON, THE 4-star, 181 beds
  • snf MORAVIAN HALL SQUARE HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER 4-star, 61 beds

Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
